---
title: "AggrAOI_Familie"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  results = "asis"
)
```
<style>
table {
  width: 100%;
  table-layout: fixed;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

th, td {
  white-space: normal !important;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  vertical-align: top;
  padding: 4px;
}
</style>

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(mgcv)
```

Da wir die überlappungen von INC nicht kennen, müssen wir ohne diesen Datensatz entscheiden.
```{r}
c_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_bed.rds"))
c_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_ein.rds"))
n_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_bed.rds"))
n_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_ein.rds"))
CS      <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "CS.rds"))
INC      <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "INC.rds"))
```

<br><br>
```{r}
c_bed <- c_bed %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
c_ein <- c_ein %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
n_bed <- n_bed %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
n_ein <- n_ein %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
CS    <- CS    %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
INC    <- INC    %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0)
```
<br><br>

Wir fangen wiedr mit Poisson an, den können wir schnell belegen oder wiederlegen.
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(performance)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

extract_overdisp_value <- function(od, candidates) {
  nms <- names(od)
  hit <- candidates[candidates %in% nms][1]
  if (is.na(hit)) return(NA_real_)
  val <- od[[hit]]
  if (length(val) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(val[[1]])
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet positive Response. Für Poisson wird intern gerundet.
# AOI-aggregierte Modellierung bleibt erhalten:
# genau ein Modell pro aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_overdisp_data <- function(df,
                               response = "FRT",
                               use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      y_pois = round(.data[[response]]),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL PRO CLUSTER
# AOI-aggregierte Modellierung bleibt erhalten
# =========================================================

make_formula_overdisp <- function(response = "y_pois",
                                  use_speaker = FALSE,
                                  n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  } else {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# OVERDISPERSION AUS performance::check_overdispersion()
# =========================================================

compute_overdispersion_from_fit <- function(fit) {
  od <- tryCatch(
    performance::check_overdispersion(fit),
    error = function(e) e
  )

  if (inherits(od, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      od_check_ok = FALSE,
      od_error = conditionMessage(od),
      dispersion_ratio = NA_real_,
      chisq_statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    od_check_ok = TRUE,
    od_error = NA_character_,
    dispersion_ratio = extract_overdisp_value(
      od,
      candidates = c("dispersion_ratio", "dispersion", "ratio")
    ),
    chisq_statistic = extract_overdisp_value(
      od,
      candidates = c("chisq_statistic", "chi_squared", "statistic")
    ),
    p_value = extract_overdisp_value(
      od,
      candidates = c("p_value", "p", "p.val")
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT + OVERDISPERSION-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_poisson_and_check <- function(df,
                                  formula) {
  warns <- character(0)
  msgs <- character(0)

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = poisson(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warns <<- c(warns, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msgs <<- c(msgs, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning = collapse_unique(c(warns, msgs)),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      od_check_ok = FALSE,
      od_error = NA_character_,
      dispersion_ratio = NA_real_,
      chisq_statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  od <- compute_overdispersion_from_fit(fit)

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning = collapse_unique(c(warns, msgs)),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(od)
}

# =========================================================
# EIN EXPERIMENT
# GENAU EIN MODELL PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_overdispersion_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                              exp_name,
                                              response = "FRT",
                                              use_speaker = FALSE) {
  prep <- prep_overdisp_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
    return(list(
      fit_details = tibble(),
      fit_summary = tibble()
    ))
  }

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  fit_details <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, as.character(cluster_sizes$aggr_level))
    ]

    formula_type <- if (n_aoi_cluster > 1) "AOI_condition" else "condition_only"

    formula_i <- make_formula_overdisp(
      response = "y_pois",
      use_speaker = use_speaker,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    fit_info <- fit_poisson_and_check(
      df = dat_cluster,
      formula = formula_i
    )

    tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      formula_type = formula_type,
      n_obs = nrow(dat_cluster),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Participant),
      n_conditions = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$condition),
      n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$AOI),
      n_speakers = if (use_speaker) dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$speaker) else NA_integer_,
      formula = paste(deparse(formula_i), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        overdispersed_0_05 = dispersion_ratio > 1 & p_value < 0.05
      )
  })

  fit_summary <- fit_details %>%
    summarise(
      experiment = exp_name,
      n_clusters = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_od_check_failed = sum(od_check_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_with_any_warning = sum(!is.na(fit_warning), na.rm = TRUE),
      n_overdispersed_0_05 = sum(overdispersed_0_05 %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_dispersion_ratio = mean(dispersion_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_dispersion_ratio = median(dispersion_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  list(
    fit_details = fit_details,
    fit_summary = fit_summary
  )
}

# =========================================================
# ÜBER ALLE EXPERIMENTE
# =========================================================

run_overdispersion_all <- function(dfs,
                                   response = "FRT",
                                   experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")) {
  nested <- purrr::imap(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_overdispersion_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker
    )
  })

  list(
    nested = nested,
    fit_details_all = bind_rows(purrr::map(nested, "fit_details")),
    fit_summary_all = bind_rows(purrr::map(nested, "fit_summary"))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_overdisp <- run_overdispersion_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "FRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#res_overdisp$fit_details_all
#res_overdisp$fit_summary_all

knitr::kable(
  res_overdisp$fit_details_all %>% select(experiment, aggr_level, dispersion_ratio,chisq_statistic, overdispersed_0_05 ),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

knitr::kable(
  res_overdisp$fit_summary_all %>% select(experiment, n_clusters, n_overdispersed_0_05, mean_dispersion_ratio,median_dispersion_ratio),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)



```

<br><br>



*NegBin1 vs NegBin2, Topic LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(glmmTMB)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

safe_mean <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  mean(x)
}

safe_rmse <- function(sq_error) {
  sq_error <- sq_error[is.finite(sq_error)]
  if (length(sq_error) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  sqrt(mean(sq_error))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_nb_data <- function(df,
                         response = "FRT",
                         use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster <- function(response = "FRT",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                 n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  } else {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FIT EINER NB-FAMILIE
# =========================================================

fit_nb_model <- function(df,
                         formula,
                         family_name = c("nbinom1", "nbinom2")) {
  family_name <- match.arg(family_name)

  fam <- switch(
    family_name,
    nbinom1 = glmmTMB::nbinom1(link = "log"),
    nbinom2 = glmmTMB::nbinom2(link = "log")
  )

  warns <- character()
  msgs <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = fam
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warns <<- c(warns, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msgs <<- c(msgs, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit = NULL,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning = collapse_unique(c(warns, msgs)),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit = fit,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning = collapse_unique(c(warns, msgs)),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# VOLLE DATEN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

run_nb_fullfits_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                           exp_name,
                                           response = "FRT",
                                           use_speaker = FALSE) {
  prep <- prep_nb_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(c("nbinom1", "nbinom2"), function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
      )

      fit_out <- fit_nb_model(
        df = dat_cluster,
        formula = formula_i,
        family_name = fam_i
      )

      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        family_name = fam_i,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
        n_obs = nrow(dat_cluster),
        n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Topic),
        n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Participant),
        formula = paste(deparse(formula_i), collapse = " "),
        fit_ok = fit_out$fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_out$fit_error,
        fit_warning = fit_out$fit_warning,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_out$fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_out$fit_nonzero_convergence,
        aic = fit_out$aic,
        bic = fit_out$bic,
        logLik = fit_out$logLik
      )
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC LOO PREDICTION PRO CLUSTER
#  prediction: re.form = NULL
# =========================================================

run_nb_topicloo_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                           exp_name,
                                           response = "FRT",
                                           use_speaker = FALSE) {
  prep <- prep_nb_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(c("nbinom1", "nbinom2"), function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

      purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
        train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
          filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

        test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
          filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

        formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
          response = response,
          use_speaker = use_speaker,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
        )

        fit_out <- fit_nb_model(
          df = train_df,
          formula = formula_i,
          family_name = fam_i
        )

        pred <- if (isTRUE(fit_out$fit_ok)) {
          tryCatch(
            predict(
              fit_out$fit,
              newdata = test_df,
              type = "response",
              re.form = NULL,
              allow.new.levels = TRUE
            ),
            error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
          )
        } else {
          rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
        }

        tibble(
          experiment = exp_name,
          family_name = fam_i,
          aggr_level = aggr_i,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
          cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
          heldout_topic = topic_i,
          AOI = as.character(test_df$AOI),
          observed = test_df[[response]],
          pred = as.numeric(pred),
          abs_error = abs(test_df[[response]] - as.numeric(pred)),
          sq_error = (test_df[[response]] - as.numeric(pred))^2,
          fit_ok = fit_out$fit_ok,
          fit_error = fit_out$fit_error,
          fit_warning = fit_out$fit_warning,
          fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_out$fit_nonposdef_hessian,
          fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_out$fit_nonzero_convergence
        )
      })
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# ÜBER ALLE EXPERIMENTE
# =========================================================

run_nb1_nb2_compare_all <- function(dfs,
                                    response = "FRT",
                                    experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")) {
  fullfits_all <- purrr::imap_dfr(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_nb_fullfits_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker
    )
  })

  topicloo_raw_all <- purrr::imap_dfr(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_nb_topicloo_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker
    )
  })

  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # VOLLE DATEN: DIREKTER CLUSTERWEISER VERGLEICH
  # ---------------------------------------------------------

  fullfits_comparison <- fullfits_all %>%
    select(
      experiment, aggr_level, n_aoi_in_cluster, cluster_formula_type,
      family_name, fit_ok, fit_nonposdef_hessian, fit_nonzero_convergence,
      fit_warning, aic, bic, logLik
    ) %>%
    mutate(has_warning = !is.na(fit_warning)) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = family_name,
      values_from = c(fit_ok, fit_nonposdef_hessian, fit_nonzero_convergence, has_warning, aic, bic, logLik),
      names_sep = "__"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      delta_aic_nb2_minus_nb1 = aic__nbinom2 - aic__nbinom1,
      delta_bic_nb2_minus_nb1 = bic__nbinom2 - bic__nbinom1,
      winner_aic = case_when(
        is.na(delta_aic_nb2_minus_nb1) ~ NA_character_,
        delta_aic_nb2_minus_nb1 < 0 ~ "nbinom2",
        delta_aic_nb2_minus_nb1 > 0 ~ "nbinom1",
        TRUE ~ "equal"
      ),
      winner_bic = case_when(
        is.na(delta_bic_nb2_minus_nb1) ~ NA_character_,
        delta_bic_nb2_minus_nb1 < 0 ~ "nbinom2",
        delta_bic_nb2_minus_nb1 > 0 ~ "nbinom1",
        TRUE ~ "equal"
      )
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # TOPIC-LOO: FIT-EBENE KORREKT DEDUPLIZIEREN
  # ---------------------------------------------------------

  topicloo_fit_level <- topicloo_raw_all %>%
    distinct(
      experiment, family_name, aggr_level, n_aoi_in_cluster,
      cluster_formula_type, heldout_topic,
      fit_ok, fit_error, fit_warning,
      fit_nonposdef_hessian, fit_nonzero_convergence
    )

  topicloo_fit_summary_cluster <- topicloo_fit_level %>%
    group_by(experiment, family_name, aggr_level, n_aoi_in_cluster, cluster_formula_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_warning = sum(!is.na(fit_warning), na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # TOPIC-LOO: AOI-SPEZIFISCHE PREDICTION
  # ---------------------------------------------------------

  topicloo_prediction_summary <- topicloo_raw_all %>%
    group_by(experiment, family_name, AOI, aggr_level, n_aoi_in_cluster, cluster_formula_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n_pred = sum(!is.na(pred)),
      rmse = safe_rmse(sq_error),
      mae = safe_mean(abs_error),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  topicloo_summary <- topicloo_prediction_summary %>%
    left_join(
      topicloo_fit_summary_cluster,
      by = c("experiment", "family_name", "aggr_level", "n_aoi_in_cluster", "cluster_formula_type")
    )

  topicloo_comparison <- topicloo_summary %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = family_name,
      values_from = c(n_pred, rmse, mae, n_holdout_fits, n_fit_failed, n_hessian, n_convergence, n_warning),
      names_sep = "__"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      delta_rmse_nb2_minus_nb1 = rmse__nbinom2 - rmse__nbinom1,
      delta_mae_nb2_minus_nb1 = mae__nbinom2 - mae__nbinom1,
      winner_rmse = case_when(
        is.na(delta_rmse_nb2_minus_nb1) ~ NA_character_,
        delta_rmse_nb2_minus_nb1 < 0 ~ "nbinom2",
        delta_rmse_nb2_minus_nb1 > 0 ~ "nbinom1",
        TRUE ~ "equal"
      ),
      winner_mae = case_when(
        is.na(delta_mae_nb2_minus_nb1) ~ NA_character_,
        delta_mae_nb2_minus_nb1 < 0 ~ "nbinom2",
        delta_mae_nb2_minus_nb1 > 0 ~ "nbinom1",
        TRUE ~ "equal"
      )
    )

  compact_experiment <- topicloo_comparison %>%
    group_by(experiment) %>%
    summarise(
      n_aoi = dplyr::n(),
      mean_rmse_nb1 = safe_mean(rmse__nbinom1),
      mean_rmse_nb2 = safe_mean(rmse__nbinom2),
      mean_mae_nb1 = safe_mean(mae__nbinom1),
      mean_mae_nb2 = safe_mean(mae__nbinom2),
      nb1_better_rmse = sum(winner_rmse == "nbinom1", na.rm = TRUE),
      nb2_better_rmse = sum(winner_rmse == "nbinom2", na.rm = TRUE),
      nb1_better_mae = sum(winner_mae == "nbinom1", na.rm = TRUE),
      nb2_better_mae = sum(winner_mae == "nbinom2", na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    fullfits_all = fullfits_all,
    fullfits_comparison = fullfits_comparison,
    topicloo_raw_all = topicloo_raw_all,
    topicloo_fit_level = topicloo_fit_level,
    topicloo_fit_summary_cluster = topicloo_fit_summary_cluster,
    topicloo_summary = topicloo_summary,
    topicloo_comparison = topicloo_comparison,
    compact_experiment = compact_experiment
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_nb_compare <- run_nb1_nb2_compare_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "FRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

# Volle Daten pro Cluster
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$fullfits_all)

# AIC/BIC Vergleich pro Cluster
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$fullfits_comparison)

# Topic-LOO: Fit-Ebene pro Cluster
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$topicloo_fit_summary_cluster)

# Topic-LOO: AOI-spezifische Prediction plus korrekt gezählte Fitprobleme
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$topicloo_summary) %>% select(experiment, family_name, AOI, aggr_level, n_warning)

# Direkter Topic-LOO Vergleich
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$topicloo_comparison)

# Knappe Zusammenfassung pro Experiment
#round_df_4(res_nb_compare$compact_experiment)



### Tabelle Knitready
knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_nb_compare$compact_experiment),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
<br><br>

*Fit - Probleme NegBin1 vs NegBin2*
```{r}
topicloo_fit_problem_totals <- res_nb_compare$topicloo_fit_summary_cluster %>%
  group_by(family_name) %>%
  summarise(
    n_clusters = dplyr::n(),
    n_holdout_fits = sum(n_holdout_fits, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_fit_failed = sum(n_fit_failed, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_hessian = sum(n_hessian, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_convergence = sum(n_convergence, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_warning = sum(n_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  round_df_4()

topicloo_fit_problem_totals

### Tabelle Extrahieren
exp <- topicloo_fit_problem_totals
cat(
  knitr::kable(exp, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE),
  file = "meine_tabelle.tex"
)
knitr::kable(
  topicloo_fit_problem_totals,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
<br><br>



*Wir fangen an mit Fit Stabilität auf vollen Daten.*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

progress_note <- function(..., verbose = TRUE) {
  if (!isTRUE(verbose)) return(invisible(NULL))
  msg <- paste0(...)
  message(msg)
  flush.console()
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_family_screen_data <- function(df,
                                    response = "FRT",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster <- function(response = "FRT",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                 n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  } else {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

family_names <- c(
  "gamma_log",
  "nbinom2",
  "lognormal",
  "invgauss",
  "tweedie",
  "normal"
)

get_glmmtmb_family <- function(family_name) {
  switch(
    family_name,
    gamma_log = Gamma(link = "log"),
    nbinom2   = glmmTMB::nbinom2(link = "log"),
    lognormal = glmmTMB::lognormal(link = "log"),
    invgauss  = inverse.gaussian(link = "log"),
    tweedie   = glmmTMB::tweedie(link = "log"),
    stop("Unbekannte glmmTMB-Familie: ", family_name)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK FÜR ALLE FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability <- function(df,
                                                  formula,
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  n_distinct_nLetters <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters)
  min_nLetters <- min(df$nLetters)
  max_nLetters <- max(df$nLetters)

  if (use_speaker) {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  } else {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  }

  cell_df <- cell_df %>%
    summarise(
      n_obs = dplyr::n(),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  n_cells_total <- nrow(cell_df)
  n_cells_nLetters_constant <- sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)

  redundant_cols_text <- collapse_unique(redundant_cols)

  redundant_involve_nLetters <- if (length(redundant_cols) == 0) {
    FALSE
  } else {
    any(grepl("nLetters", redundant_cols, fixed = TRUE))
  }

  rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue <- rankdef &&
    (
      n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ||
      redundant_involve_nLetters ||
      n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0
    )

  rankdef_consistency_reason <- dplyr::case_when(
    !rankdef ~ NA_character_,
    n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ~ "nLetters_has_no_global_variation",
    redundant_involve_nLetters & n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters_and_nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells",
    redundant_involve_nLetters ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters",
    n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells_but_redundancy_is_not_uniquely_attributable",
    TRUE ~
      "not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue"
  )

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = redundant_cols_text,
    n_distinct_nLetters = n_distinct_nLetters,
    min_nLetters = min_nLetters,
    max_nLetters = max_nLetters,
    n_design_cells = n_cells_total,
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = n_cells_nLetters_constant,
    rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue,
    rankdef_consistency_reason = rankdef_consistency_reason
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fam <- get_glmmtmb_family(family_name)

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = fam
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA,
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
    fit_singular = NA,
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# LMER FIT
# =========================================================

fit_lmer_capture <- function(df,
                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      lme4::lmer(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        REML = FALSE,
        control = lme4::lmerControl(
          check.rankX = "message+drop.cols",
          check.conv.singular = "message",
          check.conv.hess = "warning",
          check.conv.grad = "warning"
        )
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA,
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_singular <- lme4::isSingular(fit, tol = 1e-5)

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
    fit_singular = fit_singular,
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DISPATCH
# =========================================================

fit_model_capture <- function(df,
                              formula,
                              family_name) {
  if (family_name == "normal") {
    fit_lmer_capture(
      df = df,
      formula = formula
    )
  } else {
    fit_glmmtmb_capture(
      df = df,
      formula = formula,
      family_name = family_name
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# EINE FIT-SITUATION
# =========================================================

fit_one_screen_case <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name,
                                use_speaker = FALSE) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_info <- fit_model_capture(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    family_name = family_name
  )

  bind_cols(design_info, fit_info)
}

# =========================================================
# VOLLE DATEN: EIN EXPERIMENT
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_full_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                                  exp_name,
                                                  response = "FRT",
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE,
                                                  verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_family_screen_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(family_names, function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
      )

      progress_note(
        "[FULL] exp=", exp_name,
        " family=", fam_i,
        " cluster=", aggr_i,
        " n=", nrow(dat_cluster),
        verbose = verbose
      )

      fit_out <- fit_one_screen_case(
        df = dat_cluster,
        formula = formula_i,
        family_name = fam_i,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )

      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        family_name = fam_i,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
        n_obs = nrow(dat_cluster),
        n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Topic),
        n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Participant),
        formula = paste(deparse(formula_i), collapse = " ")
      ) %>%
        bind_cols(fit_out)
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# ÜBER ALLE EXPERIMENTE
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_full_all <- function(dfs,
                                       response = "FRT",
                                       experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS"),
                                       verbose = TRUE) {
  full_all <- purrr::imap_dfr(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_family_screen_full_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker,
      verbose = verbose
    )
  })

  full_summary <- full_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, family_name) %>%
    summarise(
      n_clusters = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE & !(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_singular = sum(fit_singular %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_aic = mean(aic, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_aic = median(aic, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  full_overall <- full_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(family_name) %>%
    summarise(
      n_clusters = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE & !(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_singular = sum(fit_singular %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_aic = mean(aic, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_aic = median(aic, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    full_all = full_all,
    full_summary = full_summary,
    full_overall = full_overall
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_family_screen_full <- run_family_screen_full_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "FRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_family_screen_full$full_all)
#round_df_4(res_family_screen_full$full_summary)


#round_df_4(res_family_screen_full$full_overall)


### Tabelle Knitready
knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_family_screen_full$full_overall) %>% select(-n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue, -mean_aic, -median_aic, -n_fit_failed),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
<br><br>

*Wir testen numerische stabilität auf Topic-LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

progress_note <- function(..., verbose = TRUE) {
  if (!isTRUE(verbose)) return(invisible(NULL))
  msg <- paste0(...)
  message(msg)
  flush.console()
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_family_screen_data <- function(df,
                                    response = "FRT",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster <- function(response = "FRT",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                 n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  } else {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

family_names <- c(
  "gamma_log",
  "nbinom2",
  "normal"
)

get_glmmtmb_family <- function(family_name) {
  switch(
    family_name,
    gamma_log = Gamma(link = "log"),
    nbinom2   = glmmTMB::nbinom2(link = "log"),
    stop("Unbekannte glmmTMB-Familie: ", family_name)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK FÜR ALLE FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability <- function(df,
                                                  formula,
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  n_distinct_nLetters <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters)
  min_nLetters <- min(df$nLetters)
  max_nLetters <- max(df$nLetters)

  if (use_speaker) {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  } else {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  }

  cell_df <- cell_df %>%
    summarise(
      n_obs = dplyr::n(),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  n_cells_total <- nrow(cell_df)
  n_cells_nLetters_constant <- sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)

  redundant_cols_text <- collapse_unique(redundant_cols)

  redundant_involve_nLetters <- if (length(redundant_cols) == 0) {
    FALSE
  } else {
    any(grepl("nLetters", redundant_cols, fixed = TRUE))
  }

  rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue <- rankdef &&
    (
      n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ||
      redundant_involve_nLetters ||
      n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0
    )

  rankdef_consistency_reason <- dplyr::case_when(
    !rankdef ~ NA_character_,
    n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ~ "nLetters_has_no_global_variation",
    redundant_involve_nLetters & n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters_and_nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells",
    redundant_involve_nLetters ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters",
    n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells_but_redundancy_is_not_uniquely_attributable",
    TRUE ~
      "not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue"
  )

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = redundant_cols_text,
    n_distinct_nLetters = n_distinct_nLetters,
    min_nLetters = min_nLetters,
    max_nLetters = max_nLetters,
    n_design_cells = n_cells_total,
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = n_cells_nLetters_constant,
    rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue,
    rankdef_consistency_reason = rankdef_consistency_reason
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fam <- get_glmmtmb_family(family_name)

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = fam
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA,
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
    fit_singular = NA,
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# LMER FIT
# =========================================================

fit_lmer_capture <- function(df,
                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      lme4::lmer(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        REML = FALSE,
        control = lme4::lmerControl(
          check.rankX = "message+drop.cols",
          check.conv.singular = "message",
          check.conv.hess = "warning",
          check.conv.grad = "warning"
        )
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA,
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_singular <- lme4::isSingular(fit, tol = 1e-5)

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
    fit_singular = fit_singular,
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DISPATCH
# =========================================================

fit_model_capture <- function(df,
                              formula,
                              family_name) {
  if (family_name == "normal") {
    fit_lmer_capture(
      df = df,
      formula = formula
    )
  } else {
    fit_glmmtmb_capture(
      df = df,
      formula = formula,
      family_name = family_name
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# EINE FIT-SITUATION
# =========================================================

fit_one_screen_case <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name,
                                use_speaker = FALSE) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_info <- fit_model_capture(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    family_name = family_name
  )

  bind_cols(design_info, fit_info)
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO: EIN EXPERIMENT
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_loo_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name,
                                                 response = "FRT",
                                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                                 verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_family_screen_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(family_names, function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

      purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
        train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
          filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

        formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
          response = response,
          use_speaker = use_speaker,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
        )

        progress_note(
          "[LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " family=", fam_i,
          " cluster=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df),
          verbose = verbose
        )

        fit_out <- fit_one_screen_case(
          df = train_df,
          formula = formula_i,
          family_name = fam_i,
          use_speaker = use_speaker
        )

        tibble(
          experiment = exp_name,
          family_name = fam_i,
          aggr_level = aggr_i,
          heldout_topic = topic_i,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
          cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
          n_train = nrow(train_df),
          formula = paste(deparse(formula_i), collapse = " ")
        ) %>%
          bind_cols(fit_out)
      })
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# ÜBER ALLE EXPERIMENTE
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_loo_all <- function(dfs,
                                      response = "FRT",
                                      experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS"),
                                      verbose = TRUE) {
  loo_all <- purrr::imap_dfr(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_family_screen_loo_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker,
      verbose = verbose
    )
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, family_name) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE & !(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_singular = sum(fit_singular %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_fit_failed = n_fit_failed / n_holdout_fits,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  loo_overall <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(family_name) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = sum(
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE & !(rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue %in% TRUE),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_singular = sum(fit_singular %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_fit_failed = n_fit_failed / n_holdout_fits,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    loo_overall = loo_overall
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_family_screen_loo <- run_family_screen_loo_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "FRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_family_screen_loo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_family_screen_loo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_family_screen_loo$loo_overall)


### Tabelle Knitready
knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_family_screen_loo$loo_overall) %>% select(-n_rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue, -n_rankdef_not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue,-prop_fit_failed,-n_fit_failed),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
<br><br>


*Wir checken auch TRT, falls wir Familien hier weiter reduzieren  können. (inkl LOO)*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

progress_note <- function(..., verbose = TRUE) {
  if (!isTRUE(verbose)) return(invisible(NULL))
  msg <- paste0(...)
  message(msg)
  flush.console()
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_family_screen_data <- function(df,
                                    response = "TRT",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster <- function(response = "TRT",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                 n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  } else {
    if (use_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    } else {
      "condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    }
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

family_names <- c("gamma_log", "nbinom2", "normal")

get_glmmtmb_family <- function(family_name) {
  switch(
    family_name,
    gamma_log = Gamma(link = "log"),
    nbinom2   = glmmTMB::nbinom2(link = "log"),
    stop("Unbekannte glmmTMB-Familie: ", family_name)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK FÜR ALLE FAMILIEN
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability <- function(df,
                                                  formula,
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  n_distinct_nLetters <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters)
  min_nLetters <- min(df$nLetters)
  max_nLetters <- max(df$nLetters)

  if (use_speaker) {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  } else {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(AOI, condition, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>%
        group_by(condition, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  }

  cell_df <- cell_df %>%
    summarise(
      n_obs = dplyr::n(),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  n_cells_total <- nrow(cell_df)
  n_cells_nLetters_constant <- sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)

  redundant_cols_text <- collapse_unique(redundant_cols)

  redundant_involve_nLetters <- if (length(redundant_cols) == 0) {
    FALSE
  } else {
    any(grepl("nLetters", redundant_cols, fixed = TRUE))
  }

  rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue <- rankdef &&
    (
      n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ||
      redundant_involve_nLetters ||
      n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0
    )

  rankdef_consistency_reason <- dplyr::case_when(
    !rankdef ~ NA_character_,
    n_distinct_nLetters <= 1 ~ "nLetters_has_no_global_variation",
    redundant_involve_nLetters & n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters_and_nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells",
    redundant_involve_nLetters ~
      "redundant_cols_involve_nLetters",
    n_cells_nLetters_constant > 0 ~
      "nLetters_is_constant_in_some_cells_but_redundancy_is_not_uniquely_attributable",
    TRUE ~
      "not_clearly_consistent_with_nLetters_issue"
  )

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = redundant_cols_text,
    n_distinct_nLetters = n_distinct_nLetters,
    min_nLetters = min_nLetters,
    max_nLetters = max_nLetters,
    n_design_cells = n_cells_total,
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = n_cells_nLetters_constant,
    rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue = rankdef_consistent_with_nLetters_issue,
    rankdef_consistency_reason = rankdef_consistency_reason
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fam <- get_glmmtmb_family(family_name)

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = fam
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
    fit_singular = NA
  )
}

# =========================================================
# LMER FIT
# =========================================================

fit_lmer_capture <- function(df,
                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      lme4::lmer(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        REML = FALSE,
        control = lme4::lmerControl(
          check.rankX = "message+drop.cols",
          check.conv.singular = "message",
          check.conv.hess = "warning",
          check.conv.grad = "warning"
        )
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      fit_singular = NA
    ))
  }

  fit_singular <- lme4::isSingular(fit, tol = 1e-5)

  tibble(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
    fit_singular = fit_singular
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DISPATCH
# =========================================================

fit_model_capture <- function(df,
                              formula,
                              family_name) {
  if (family_name == "normal") {
    fit_lmer_capture(df = df, formula = formula)
  } else {
    fit_glmmtmb_capture(df = df, formula = formula, family_name = family_name)
  }
}

# =========================================================
# EINE FIT-SITUATION
# =========================================================

fit_one_screen_case <- function(df,
                                formula,
                                family_name,
                                use_speaker = FALSE) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_info <- fit_model_capture(
    df = df,
    formula = formula,
    family_name = family_name
  )

  bind_cols(design_info, fit_info)
}

# =========================================================
# VOLLE DATEN: EIN EXPERIMENT
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_full_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                                  exp_name,
                                                  response = "TRT",
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE,
                                                  verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_family_screen_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(family_names, function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
      )

      progress_note(
        "[FULL] exp=", exp_name,
        " family=", fam_i,
        " cluster=", aggr_i,
        " n=", nrow(dat_cluster),
        verbose = verbose
      )

      fit_out <- fit_one_screen_case(
        df = dat_cluster,
        formula = formula_i,
        family_name = fam_i,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )

      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        family_name = fam_i,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
        n_obs = nrow(dat_cluster),
        n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Topic),
        n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$Participant),
        formula = paste(deparse(formula_i), collapse = " ")
      ) %>%
        bind_cols(fit_out)
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO: EIN EXPERIMENT
# =========================================================

run_family_screen_loo_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name,
                                                 response = "TRT",
                                                 use_speaker = FALSE,
                                                 verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_family_screen_data(df, response, use_speaker)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(family_names, function(fam_i) {
    purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
      dat_cluster <- dat %>%
        filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

      n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
        match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
      ]

      topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

      purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
        train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
          filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

        formula_i <- make_formula_cluster(
          response = response,
          use_speaker = use_speaker,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
        )

        progress_note(
          "[LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " family=", fam_i,
          " cluster=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df),
          verbose = verbose
        )

        fit_out <- fit_one_screen_case(
          df = train_df,
          formula = formula_i,
          family_name = fam_i,
          use_speaker = use_speaker
        )

        tibble(
          experiment = exp_name,
          family_name = fam_i,
```
