```{r}
      n_negbin_win = sum(winner == "hurdle_negbinomial", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_tie = sum(winner == "tie", na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = mean(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = median(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_gamma = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_negbin = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_problem_fit = sum(
        fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE |
          fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_negbin_problem_fit = sum(
        fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE |
          fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    )

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_pairwise = loo_wide,
    loo_summary_by_experiment = loo_summary_by_experiment,
    loo_summary_overall = loo_summary_overall
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_rrt_topicloo <- run_rrt_topicloo_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "RRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_rrt_topicloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_rrt_topicloo$loo_pairwise)

#round_df_4(res_rrt_topicloo$loo_summary_overall)



### Tabelle Knitready
knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_rrt_topicloo$loo_summary_by_experiment),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

```
<br><br>


*Participant LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# Erwartet vorhandene Datensätze:
# c_bed, c_ein, n_bed, n_ein, CS
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")
family_names_rrt <- c("hurdle_gamma", "hurdle_negbinomial")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

progress_note <- function(..., verbose = TRUE) {
  if (!isTRUE(verbose)) return(invisible(NULL))
  msg <- paste0(...)
  message(msg)
  flush.console()
}

clip_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-12) {
  pmin(pmax(p, eps), 1 - eps)
}

safe_log <- function(x, eps = 1e-12) {
  log(pmax(x, eps))
}

classify_warning_type <- function(warning_message, error_message = NA_character_) {
  txt <- paste(c(error_message, warning_message), collapse = " | ")

  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(txt) || !nzchar(txt) ~ "none",
    stringr::str_detect(txt, stringr::regex("non-positive-definite Hessian|failed to invert Hessian|pdHess", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "hessian",
    stringr::str_detect(txt, stringr::regex("false convergence|singular convergence", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "convergence",
    stringr::str_detect(txt, stringr::regex("NA/NaN function evaluation", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "nan_eval",
    stringr::str_detect(txt, stringr::regex("singular", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "singular",
    TRUE ~ "other"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_rrt_participantloo_data <- function(df,
                                         response = "RRT",
                                         use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "condition", "AOI", "aggr_level")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level))

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% filter(!is.na(speaker))
  }

  out <- out %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>% mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIXED PARTS
# =========================================================

get_fixed_formula_rrt <- function(dataset_name, dat_cluster) {
  n_aoi <- dplyr::n_distinct(dat_cluster$AOI)

  if (n_aoi > 1) {
    if (dataset_name %in% experiments_with_speaker) {
      "AOI * condition * speaker + nLetters"
    } else {
      "AOI * condition + nLetters"
    }
  } else {
    if (dataset_name %in% experiments_with_speaker) {
      "condition * speaker + nLetters"
    } else {
      "condition + nLetters"
    }
  }
}

make_rrt_formulas <- function(dataset_name, dat_cluster, response = "RRT") {
  fixed_part <- get_fixed_formula_rrt(dataset_name, dat_cluster)

  cond_formula <- as.formula(
    paste0(response, " ~ ", fixed_part, " + (1 | Participant) + (1 | Topic)")
  )

  zi_formula <- as.formula(
    paste0("~ ", fixed_part)
  )

  list(
    cond_formula = cond_formula,
    zi_formula = zi_formula
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_rrt <- function(df,
                                                      cond_formula,
                                                      zi_formula,
                                                      use_speaker = FALSE) {
  fixed_formula_cond <- lme4::nobars(cond_formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula_cond, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula_cond, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  n_distinct_nLetters <- dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters)
  min_nLetters <- min(df$nLetters)
  max_nLetters <- max(df$nLetters)

  if (use_speaker) {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>% group_by(AOI, condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>% group_by(condition, speaker, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  } else {
    if (dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI) > 1) {
      cell_df <- df %>% group_by(AOI, condition, .drop = FALSE)
    } else {
      cell_df <- df %>% group_by(condition, .drop = FALSE)
    }
  }

  cell_df <- cell_df %>%
    summarise(
      n_obs = dplyr::n(),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  n_cells_total <- nrow(cell_df)
  n_cells_nLetters_constant <- sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)

  tibble(
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(cond_formula), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(zi_formula), collapse = " "),
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = n_distinct_nLetters,
    min_nLetters = min_nLetters,
    max_nLetters = max_nLetters,
    n_design_cells = n_cells_total,
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = n_cells_nLetters_constant
  )
}

# =========================================================
# MODEL FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_rrt_model <- function(train_df,
                              dataset_name,
                              family_name,
                              response = "RRT") {
  forms <- make_rrt_formulas(
    dataset_name = dataset_name,
    dat_cluster = train_df,
    response = response
  )

  warns <- character()
  msgs  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      {
        if (family_name == "hurdle_gamma") {
          glmmTMB(
            formula = forms$cond_formula,
            ziformula = forms$zi_formula,
            data = droplevels(train_df),
            family = ziGamma(link = "log")
          )
        } else if (family_name == "hurdle_negbinomial") {
          glmmTMB(
            formula = forms$cond_formula,
            ziformula = forms$zi_formula,
            data = droplevels(train_df),
            family = truncated_nbinom2(link = "log")
          )
        } else {
          stop("Unbekannte Familie: ", family_name)
        }
      },
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warns <<- c(warns, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msgs <<- c(msgs, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_ok = FALSE,
      fit = NULL,
      cond_formula = forms$cond_formula,
      zi_formula = forms$zi_formula,
      fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warns),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msgs),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warns))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msgs))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
      warning_type = classify_warning_type(collapse_unique(warns), conditionMessage(fit)),
      aic = NA_real_,
      bic = NA_real_,
      logLik = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_ok = TRUE,
    fit = fit,
    cond_formula = forms$cond_formula,
    zi_formula = forms$zi_formula,
    fit_error = NA_character_,
    fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warns),
    fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msgs),
    n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warns))),
    n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msgs))),
    fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
    fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
    warning_type = classify_warning_type(collapse_unique(warns), NA_character_),
    aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
    logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# OUT-OF-SAMPLE LOG-LIKELIHOOD
# Participant-LOO:
# - neuer Participant bekommt RE = 0
# - bekannte Topics bleiben konditioniert erhalten
# =========================================================

predict_rrt_loglik_test <- function(fit,
                                    test_df,
                                    family_name,
                                    response = "RRT",
                                    eps = 1e-12) {
  y <- test_df[[response]]

  zprob <- tryCatch(
    predict(
      fit,
      newdata = test_df,
      type = "zprob",
      allow.new.levels = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
  )

  mu_cond <- tryCatch(
    predict(
      fit,
      newdata = test_df,
      type = "conditional",
      allow.new.levels = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
  )

  zprob <- clip_prob(as.numeric(zprob), eps = eps)
  mu_cond <- pmax(as.numeric(mu_cond), eps)

  ll_i <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))

  zero_idx <- which(y == 0)
  pos_idx  <- which(y > 0)

  if (length(zero_idx) > 0) {
    ll_i[zero_idx] <- safe_log(zprob[zero_idx], eps = eps)
  }

  if (family_name == "hurdle_gamma") {
    phi <- tryCatch(as.numeric(sigma(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    phi <- pmax(phi, eps)

    shape_gamma <- 1 / phi
    scale_gamma <- mu_cond * phi

    if (length(pos_idx) > 0) {
      dens_pos <- dgamma(
        x = y[pos_idx],
        shape = shape_gamma,
        scale = scale_gamma[pos_idx],
        log = TRUE
      )

      ll_i[pos_idx] <- safe_log(1 - zprob[pos_idx], eps = eps) + dens_pos
    }
  }

  if (family_name == "hurdle_negbinomial") {
    size_nb <- tryCatch(as.numeric(sigma(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    size_nb <- pmax(size_nb, eps)

    if (length(pos_idx) > 0) {
      log_d_nb <- dnbinom(
        x = y[pos_idx],
        mu = mu_cond[pos_idx],
        size = size_nb,
        log = TRUE
      )

      p0_nb <- dnbinom(
        x = 0,
        mu = mu_cond[pos_idx],
        size = size_nb,
        log = FALSE
      )

      log_trunc_adj <- safe_log(1 - p0_nb, eps = eps)

      ll_i[pos_idx] <- safe_log(1 - zprob[pos_idx], eps = eps) + log_d_nb - log_trunc_adj
    }
  }

  mu_overall <- (1 - zprob) * mu_cond
  err <- y - mu_overall

  tibble(
    observed = y,
    is_zero = y == 0,
    pred_zero_prob = zprob,
    pred_positive_prob = 1 - zprob,
    pred_cond_mean = mu_cond,
    pred_overall_mean = mu_overall,
    error = err,
    abs_error = abs(err),
    loglik_i = ll_i
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN EXPERIMENT
# =========================================================

run_rrt_participantloo_one_experiment <- function(df,
                                                  exp_name,
                                                  response = "RRT",
                                                  use_speaker = FALSE,
                                                  verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_rrt_participantloo_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes
  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(part_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != part_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == part_i)

      purrr::map_dfr(family_names_rrt, function(fam_i) {
        progress_note(
          "[RRT Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " cluster=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", part_i,
          " family=", fam_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df),
          " n_test=", nrow(test_df),
          verbose = verbose
        )

        fit_out <- fit_one_rrt_model(
          train_df = train_df,
          dataset_name = exp_name,
          family_name = fam_i,
          response = response
        )

        design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_rrt(
          df = train_df,
          cond_formula = fit_out$cond_formula,
          zi_formula = fit_out$zi_formula,
          use_speaker = use_speaker
        )

        base_row <- tibble(
          experiment = exp_name,
          family_name = fam_i,
          aggr_level = aggr_i,
          heldout_participant = part_i,
          n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
          cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_cluster > 1, "AOI_condition", "condition_only"),
          n_train = nrow(train_df),
          n_test = nrow(test_df),
          prop_zero_observed = mean(test_df[[response]] == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
          mean_observed = mean(test_df[[response]], na.rm = TRUE),
          fit_ok = fit_out$fit_ok,
          fit_error = fit_out$fit_error,
          fit_warning_text = fit_out$fit_warning_text,
          fit_message_text = fit_out$fit_message_text,
          n_warning_messages = fit_out$n_warning_messages,
          n_messages = fit_out$n_messages,
          fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_out$fit_nonposdef_hessian,
          fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_out$fit_nonzero_convergence,
          warning_type = fit_out$warning_type,
          aic = fit_out$aic,
          bic = fit_out$bic,
          logLik = fit_out$logLik
        ) %>%
          bind_cols(design_info)

        if (!isTRUE(fit_out$fit_ok)) {
          return(
            base_row %>%
              mutate(
                test_loglik_sum = NA_real_,
                test_neg_log_score = NA_real_,
                mean_loglik_i = NA_real_,
                mean_predicted = NA_real_,
                test_mae = NA_real_,
                test_rmse = NA_real_,
                prop_zero_predicted = NA_real_
              )
          )
        }

        test_pred <- predict_rrt_loglik_test(
          fit = fit_out$fit,
          test_df = test_df,
          family_name = fam_i,
          response = response
        )

        base_row %>%
          mutate(
            test_loglik_sum = sum(test_pred$loglik_i, na.rm = TRUE),
            test_neg_log_score = -sum(test_pred$loglik_i, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_loglik_i = mean(test_pred$loglik_i, na.rm = TRUE),
            mean_predicted = mean(test_pred$pred_overall_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            test_mae = mean(test_pred$abs_error, na.rm = TRUE),
            test_rmse = sqrt(mean(test_pred$error^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
            prop_zero_predicted = mean(test_pred$pred_zero_prob, na.rm = TRUE)
          )
      })
    })
  })
}

# =========================================================
# ÜBER ALLE EXPERIMENTE
# =========================================================

run_rrt_participantloo_all <- function(dfs,
                                       response = "RRT",
                                       experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS"),
                                       verbose = TRUE) {
  loo_all <- purrr::imap_dfr(dfs, function(df, exp_name) {
    run_rrt_participantloo_one_experiment(
      df = df,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker,
      verbose = verbose
    )
  })

  loo_pairwise <- loo_all %>%
    select(
      experiment, aggr_level, heldout_participant,
      family_name, fit_ok, test_loglik_sum, test_neg_log_score,
      test_mae, test_rmse,
      fit_nonposdef_hessian, fit_nonzero_convergence,
      n_warning_messages, warning_type
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = family_name,
      values_from = c(
        fit_ok, test_loglik_sum, test_neg_log_score, test_mae, test_rmse,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian, fit_nonzero_convergence,
        n_warning_messages, warning_type
      )
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma =
        test_loglik_sum_hurdle_negbinomial - test_loglik_sum_hurdle_gamma,
      winner = case_when(
        is.na(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma) ~ NA_character_,
        delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma > 1e-8 ~ "hurdle_negbinomial",
        delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma < -1e-8 ~ "hurdle_gamma",
        TRUE ~ "tie"
      )
    )

  loo_summary_by_experiment <- loo_pairwise %>%
    group_by(experiment) %>%
    summarise(
      n_splits = n(),
      n_gamma_win = sum(winner == "hurdle_gamma", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_win = sum(winner == "hurdle_negbinomial", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_tie = sum(winner == "tie", na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = mean(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = median(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_gamma = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_negbin = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae_gamma = mean(test_mae_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae_negbin = mean(test_mae_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse_gamma = mean(test_rmse_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse_negbin = mean(test_rmse_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok_hurdle_gamma %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok_hurdle_negbinomial %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_warning_fits = sum(n_warning_messages_hurdle_gamma > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_warning_fits = sum(n_warning_messages_hurdle_negbinomial > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  loo_summary_overall <- loo_pairwise %>%
    summarise(
      n_splits = n(),
      n_gamma_win = sum(winner == "hurdle_gamma", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_win = sum(winner == "hurdle_negbinomial", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_tie = sum(winner == "tie", na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = mean(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma = median(delta_loglik_negbin_minus_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_gamma = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_loglik_negbin = mean(test_loglik_sum_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae_gamma = mean(test_mae_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae_negbin = mean(test_mae_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse_gamma = mean(test_rmse_hurdle_gamma, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse_negbin = mean(test_rmse_hurdle_negbinomial, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok_hurdle_gamma %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok_hurdle_negbinomial %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_gamma %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence_hurdle_negbinomial %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_gamma_warning_fits = sum(n_warning_messages_hurdle_gamma > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_negbin_warning_fits = sum(n_warning_messages_hurdle_negbinomial > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  fit_problem_summary_long <- loo_all %>%
    group_by(family_name) %>%
    summarise(
      n_splits = n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_warning_fits = sum(n_warning_messages > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_pairwise = loo_pairwise,
    loo_summary_by_experiment = loo_summary_by_experiment,
    loo_summary_overall = loo_summary_overall,
    fit_problem_summary_long = fit_problem_summary_long
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_rrt_participantloo <- run_rrt_participantloo_all(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "RRT",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$loo_pairwise)
#round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary_by_experiment)
#round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary_overall)
#round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$fit_problem_summary_long)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary_by_experiment),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_rrt_participantloo$fit_problem_summary_long),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
